Index.title: Spacery | Free Online Web Tools & Digital Laboratory
Index.description: Access a comprehensive suite of free online tools including PDF to Word, PNG to JPG, image compressor, video editor, and developer utilities. Fast, secure, and entirely browser-based.

archive.title: Lab Archives
archive.description: A collection of weird things I've built. Pick a category to find the specific tool you need for your mission today.
archive.empty: Nothing here. Try moving a bit to the left.

privacy.title: Privacy (We're Cool)
privacy.desc: Your data stays with you. Everything is processed right in your browser. We don't keep anything—definitely not your secrets.

performance.title: Stupidly Fast
performance.desc: Built with the latest tech so it goes zoom. Turbo mode is definitely on!

support.title: Robot Help
support.desc: Part of the Spacery open-source family. Double-checked by my droids for maximum stability.

image-compressor.title: Image Compressor
image-compressor.desc: Reduces file size while maintaining visual quality. Perfect for when your high-res photos are eating too much disk space (or space-time).

image-filters.title: Image Filters
image-filters.desc: Apply cinematic effects and visual enhancements. Because every photo deserves a glow-up before being sent into the void.

image-resizer.title: Image Resizer
image-resizer.desc: Scale your visuals to the exact dimensions you need. Resize with precision, so your images aren't as stretched as a black hole's event horizon.

image-cropper.title: Image Cropper
image-cropper.desc: Trim and frame your images with pixel-perfect accuracy. Cut out the background noise faster than a laser through stardust.

svg-optimizer.title: SVG Optimizer
svg-optimizer.desc: Clean and minify vector paths for high-speed performance. Putting your heavy SVG files on a strict data-diet.

image-converter.title: Image Converter
image-converter.desc: Swiftly switch between JPG, PNG, and WEBP formats. Change image identities faster than a galactic shapeshifter.

video-compressor.title: Video Compressor
video-compressor.desc: Shrink video files for easier sharing without losing the plot. Making your 4K footage light enough for a low-bandwidth probe.

video-cutter.title: Video Cutter
video-cutter.desc: Trim clips with millisecond precision. Keep only the best scenes; truncate the boring ones like a mission report.

video-to-gif.title: Video to GIF Converter
video-to-gif.desc: Transform clips into lightweight, looping animations. Create bits of internet history one loop at a time.

video-muter.title: Video Muter
video-muter.desc: Strip audio tracks from your videos instantly. Perfect for when silence is the only mission requirement.

pdf-compressor.title: PDF Compressor
pdf-compressor.desc: Compress and optimize PDF documents for rapid transmission. Small enough to fit in a pocket dimension.

pdf-merge.title: PDF Merger
pdf-merge.desc: Consolidate multiple documents into a single, organized file. Stick them together without the mess of actual cosmic glue.

image-to-pdf.title: Image to PDF Converter
image-to-pdf.desc: Bundle your visual assets into a professional PDF document. Wrapping your photos in a neat digital package.

docx-compressor.title: Word Document Compressor
docx-compressor.desc: Efficiently optimize Microsoft Word files for sharing. Lighten the load of your intergalactic paperwork.

json-formatter.title: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.desc: Prettify or minify your JSON data structures. Turn your messy code into a neat row of well-behaved droids.

css-minifier.title: CSS Minifier
css-minifier.desc: Strip whitespace and comments from your stylesheets. Crush your code into a high-performance single line of logic.

base64-converter.title: Base64 Converter
base64-converter.desc: Encode or decode data into clean, URL-safe strings. Translate your secrets into universal digital dialect.

cosmic-password.title: Password Generator
cosmic-password.desc: Create cryptographically secure, random passwords. So strong even a telepathic alien couldn't guess your pet's name.

case-converter.title: Text Case Converter
case-converter.desc: Swap between UPPERCASE, lowercase, and camelCase. Format your transmissions for maximum clarity.

url-pulse-checker.title: URL Encoder & Decoder
url-pulse-checker.desc: Clean up messy URLs for safer, prettier links. Untangling long strings of internet spaghetti.

reading-refiner.title: Bionic Reading Tool
reading-refiner.desc: Enhance focus and speed by bolding the start of every word. Hack your brain for high-speed data consumption.

regex-tester.title: RegEx Tester
regex-tester.desc: Debug Regular Expressions with real-time Pattern matching. No more guessing why your logic broke—peek into the matrix.

random-choice-maker.title: Random Choice Maker
random-choice-maker.desc: Let fate decide—randomly pick an item from your list. Let the void choose so you don't have to.

unit-converter.title: Unit Converter
unit-converter.desc: Translate measurements between standard and astronomical scales. From millimeters to megaparsecs in a single blink.

age-calculator.title: Age Calculator
age-calculator.desc: Determine your exact age down to the day. Exactly how many times have you orbited the sun? (Don't feel too old).

discount-calculator.title: Discount Calculator
discount-calculator.desc: Calculate final prices and total savings during sales. Don't overpay for that rocket fuel ever again.

currency-converter.title: Currency Converter
currency-converter.desc: Check real-time exchange rates for global commerce. Swap your coins faster than local star-traders.

color-palette.title: Color Palette Generator
color-palette.desc: Create harmonious color schemes for your design missions. Painting the void with beautiful hex codes.

qr-generator.title: QR Code Generator
qr-generator.desc: Generate high-quality QR codes for instant data beaming. A square of logic for the curious traveler.

glassmorphism-generator.title: Glassmorphism Generator
glassmorphism-generator.desc: Design frosted glass UI components with live CSS output. Frosted visuals for the most sophisticated space stations.

color-extractor.title: Color Extractor
color-extractor.desc: Pick dominant hex codes from any image instantly. Sucking the color right out of a nebula (or a JPG).

About.title: The Guy Behind the Screen
About.description: Just a human who spent way too long staring at glowing rectangles until my eyes turned square. I like building things that are fast, shiny, and exist just because... why not? Welcome to my little corner of the void.

hustle.label: Main Hustle
hustle.value: Expert at turning coffee into magic code.

status.label: Signal Status
status.value: Looking for cool stuff to build!

Bot.title: Spacery Terminal
Bot.placeholder: Send a transmission... (tag @spacery to contact Bot)
Bot.tagRequired: You must tag @spacery for a response.
Bot.botHint: Tag @spacery to speak with Spacery Bot

descriptions.frontend: Building tough, fast, and pretty interfaces with modern frameworks.

Contact.title: Spacery HQ
Contact.description: Experimental digital lair for people who like to push buttons. 🛸
Contact.copyright: © 2026 SPACERY LABORATORY. BUIDL WITH LOVE & COFFEE.

grid.title: Toys & Experiments
grid.subtitle: Play for free. No star-coins required.

sky-glide.title: Sky Glide
sky-glide.desc: Learn to fly. Navigate through energy poles without crashing (hopefully).

stellar-oracle.title: Stellar Oracle
stellar-oracle.desc: Vent to the stars. They might actually Have an answer.

space-typer.title: Space Typer
space-typer.desc: How fast are your thumbs? Type cosmic words before the clock runs out.

orbit-defense.title: Orbit Defense
orbit-defense.desc: Protect our station from stray space junk flying around.

void-runner.title: Void Runner
void-runner.desc: Running in the void. Test your reflexes before you miss the rocket.

sky-glide.title: Sky Glide
sky-glide.registry: Your name will be etched into the galaxy guestbook. No weird aliases, please.

stellar-oracle.title: Stellar Oracle
stellar-oracle.description: The stars have observed your journey since the dawn of time (not in a creepy way, I promise). Want to vent to the universe?

cosmic-clicker.title: Cosmic Clicker
cosmic-clicker.autoSave: Don't worry, aliens record your progress every 5 seconds.

miner.name: Mining Drone
miner.desc: A tiny robot to pick up cosmic dust.

collector.name: Star Sucker
collector.desc: Sucks even more energy from neighboring stars.

swarm.name: Dyson Swarm
swarm.desc: A giant mirror network to capture sun-power.

space-typer.title: Galactic Keyboard
space-typer.hint: Escape: Quick Reset // Space: Normal Space

Construction.title: Under Recalibration
Construction.desc: Maintenance droids are currently duct-taping the logic circuits for the {category} module. Hang tight while they find where they dropped the wrench.
